nodes.text:
function from(parameters: Receipt.from.Parameters): Receipt.Receipt
namespace from
nodes.docs: Creates a receipt from the given parameters.
tags:
```ts
import { Receipt } from 'mpay'

const receipt = Receipt.from({
  method: 'tempo',
  status: 'success',
  timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
  reference: '0x...',
})
```

nodes.text:
var Date: DateConstructor
new () => Date (+4 overloads)

nodes.docs: Returns a date as a string value in ISO format.
Serializes a receipt to the Payment-Receipt header format.
tags: A base64url-encoded string suitable for the Payment-Receipt header value.
